# Requirements: Robust Complete Spec

## Introduction

Brief description of the system.

## Glossary

- **Widget**: A configurable UI element.

## Requirements

### Requirement 1: Widget Creation

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. [99-REQ-1.1] WHEN the user submits valid data, THE system SHALL create a widget.
2. [99-REQ-1.2] THE system SHALL assign a unique ID to each widget.

#### Edge Cases

1. [99-REQ-1.E1] IF the data is invalid, THEN THE system SHALL return an error.
